# Amanblaze

> Amanblaze is a software development community that designs, builds, and publishes its own Android applications on Google Play.

## About
Amanblaze is not a marketplace or app store — every app listed on this site is developed in-house by the Amanblaze team and published under our official Google Play developer account.

## Pages
- [Home](https://amanblaze.in/): Full catalog of apps published by Amanblaze, with direct Google Play install links.
- [About](https://amanblaze.in/about): Who Amanblaze is and how the team operates.
- [Privacy Policy](https://amanblaze.in/privacy): How user data is collected and used across Amanblaze apps.
- [Terms & Conditions](https://amanblaze.in/terms): Terms of use for Amanblaze apps and this website.
- [Refund Policy](https://amanblaze.in/refund): Refund eligibility for paid apps and subscriptions.
- [Contact](https://amanblaze.in/contact): How to reach Amanblaze for support or partnerships.

## Developer
Official Google Play developer page: https://play.google.com/store/apps/dev?id=8663227897723109688
